projectDescription: A TypeScript utility library for building type-safe, variant-based CSS class name components framework-agnostically.
keyFeatures: Compound variants (class combinations based on multiple variant values)
Default variant values with the ability to reset with null
Framework agnostic — works with React, Vue, Svelte, Astro, and more
Custom cx hook via defineConfig for Tailwind Merge integration
First-class TypeScript support with VariantProps type helper
publicApiSurface: cva(config) — creates a variant-aware class name builder function
cx(...inputs) — concatenates class names (alias for clsx)
compose(...components) — merges multiple cva components into one
defineConfig(options) — creates a custom cva/cx/compose with hooks
VariantProps<Component> — TypeScript utility type to extract variant props
ClassValue — TypeScript type for valid class name values
CXOptions — TypeScript type for cx input parameters
CXReturn — TypeScript type for cx return value
